mapper.select: SELECT t.FEntryID, t.FID, t.F_ora_Entity, t.F_fyxm, t.F_je, t.F_glfkje, t.FBillStatus, t.F_cdfs, t.F_ywy, t.F_gys, t.F_sqfkje, t.Fsqfkzz, t.create_time, t.update_time FROM t_kd_sales_stockout_fee t WHERE t.FID = #{fid} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_kd_sales_stockout_fee ( FEntryID, FID, F_ora_Entity, F_fyxm, F_je, F_glfkje, FBillStatus, F_cdfs, F_ywy, F_gys, F_sqfkje, Fsqfkzz, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.fentryID}, #{item.fid}, #{item.fOraEntity}, #{item.fFyxm}, #{item.fJe}, #{item.fGlfkje}, #{item.fBillStatus}, #{item.fCdfs}, #{item.fYwy}, #{item.fGys}, #{item.fSqfkje}, #{item.fsqfkzz}, NOW(), NOW() )
